title: Take a visual assistance call
blurb: Answer a quick call from someone who needs help checking or reading something visual.

title: Transcribe a page of history
blurb: Turn one historical page into text people can search and read.

title: Transcribe historical documents
blurb: Help make Library of Congress documents easier to search from home.

title: Review a transcribed page
blurb: Check a volunteer transcription against the Library of Congress page image.

title: Record a public-domain audiobook chapter
blurb: Read one public-domain chapter aloud so it can become part of a free audiobook.

title: Answer a student's career question
blurb: Write one practical answer for a student trying to understand a career path.

title: Help with real science, one photo at a time
blurb: Classify a photo or data point for a real research project.

title: Proofread a page for Project Gutenberg
blurb: Check one digitized page so a public-domain book can be cleaned up.

title: Map a neighborhood for disaster relief
blurb: Trace map details that can help responders understand an unmapped area.

title: Swipe map tiles for humanitarian projects
blurb: Use a web or mobile app to mark satellite images for mapping projects.

title: Be a listening ear for someone
blurb: Train to offer supportive listening to someone who needs to be heard.

title: Share a skill with a nonprofit
blurb: Offer a professional skill to a nonprofit that needs focused help.

title: Translate for humanitarian work
blurb: Use language fluency to help humanitarian information reach more people.

title: Train to support people in crisis
blurb: Begin the training path to support people by text during crisis moments.

title: Join a veteran-led service crew
blurb: Start with a flexible Bay Area service crew led by veterans and open to civilians too.

title: Restore Bay shoreline habitat
blurb: Spend a Saturday morning helping restore habitat along the Bay shoreline.

title: Clean up Ocean Beach
blurb: Join a Saturday morning cleanup on the sand at Ocean Beach.

title: Restore butterfly habitat
blurb: Help care for butterfly habitat in the Inner Sunset.

title: Join a neighborhood park workday
blurb: Pitch in at a neighborhood park workday from the official volunteer calendar.

title: Tend native habitat in the Presidio
blurb: Pick a Presidio habitat stewardship event from the Parks Conservancy calendar.

title: Tend the native pollinator garden
blurb: Help care for the native pollinator garden at Randall Museum.

title: Grow native plants at the nursery
blurb: Help grow native plants at the Candlestick Point nursery.

title: Plant street trees with neighbors
blurb: Join neighbors for a scheduled Saturday street-tree planting.

title: Care for senior dogs at HQ
blurb: Help care for senior dogs during a three-hour shift at Muttville HQ.

title: Write bios for adoptable dogs (from home)
blurb: Apply for Muttville's remote intake-team bio-writing role.

title: Cuddle dogs at an adoption event
blurb: Help at a Bay Area adoption event with no training required.

title: Socialize shelter cats
blurb: Spend weekly time helping shelter cats get calmer and more comfortable.

title: Be a shelter outreach volunteer
blurb: Help SF Animal Care & Control at flexible outreach events.

title: Sort and pack groceries
blurb: Sort and pack groceries during a weekday or Saturday food-bank shift.

title: Deliver groceries to homebound neighbors
blurb: Use your car to deliver groceries to homebound neighbors on a local route.

title: Welcome shoppers at a Community Market
blurb: Help shoppers feel oriented and welcome at a neighborhood Community Market.

title: Pick backyard fruit with a harvest team
blurb: Join a South Bay or Peninsula harvest team picking fruit that would otherwise go unused.

title: Serve daily free meals
blurb: Serve free meals during a daily shift in the Tenderloin.

title: Serve lunch in the dining room
blurb: Help serve lunch during a daily dining-room shift at St. Anthony's.

title: Sort clothes in the free clothing program
blurb: Sort clothing during a daytime shift for St. Anthony's free clothing program.

title: Prep meals for sick and elderly neighbors
blurb: Prepare meals for sick and elderly neighbors during a daytime shift.

title: Deliver meals to homebound seniors
blurb: Use your car to deliver meals to homebound seniors on a weekday route.

title: Call a lonely elder for a few minutes
org: Little Brothers - Friends of the Elderly
blurb: Make a short weekly call to an elder from home after a quick orientation.

title: Visit an older neighbor
org: Little Brothers - Friends of the Elderly
blurb: Visit an older neighbor in San Francisco on a flexible twice-a-month rhythm.

title: Be a stroll buddy for an elder
org: Little Brothers - Friends of the Elderly
blurb: Take a weekly neighborhood stroll with an elder who lives within a short walk.

title: Lend an older neighbor a hand
blurb: Help an older neighbor in San Francisco with a flexible practical task.

title: Befriend an LGBTQ+ elder
blurb: Offer friendly company to an LGBTQ+ elder in San Francisco through Openhouse.

title: Make friendly calls to LGBTQ+ elders
blurb: Make friendly calls from home to LGBTQ+ elders with warmth and reliability.

title: Help a refugee adult practice English
blurb: Help a refugee adult practice English for a flexible weekly commitment.

title: Cook and deliver a family lasagna
blurb: Cook one lasagna and deliver it to a nearby matched family.

title: Bake a birthday cake for a kid in foster care
blurb: Bake and drop off a birthday cake for a kid in foster care.

title: Pack a comfort kit for a foster kid
blurb: Join Foster Love's at-home Sweet Cases project for kids in foster care.

title: Make a card for a hospitalized kid
blurb: Make an uplifting handmade card at home and mail it in.

title: Tutor an adult learner (Project Read)
blurb: Tutor an adult learner through SF Public Library Project Read.

title: Register voters at a community event
blurb: Help register voters at a nonpartisan San Francisco community event.

title: Join a neighborhood cleanup (snacks after)
blurb: Join a weekend morning neighborhood cleanup, with snacks after.

title: Build civic projects at a Wednesday hack night
blurb: Show up to a Wednesday hack night and help with civic projects.

title: Help run hands-on craft activities
blurb: Help visitors take part in hands-on craft activities at weekend events.

title: Restore the trails on Mount Sutro
blurb: Restore Mount Sutro trails at a calendar-listed Sutro Stewards event.

title: Restore bird habitat in Golden Gate Park
blurb: Help restore bird habitat around North Lake in Golden Gate Park.

title: Care for the Presidio's urban forest
blurb: Spend a Friday morning caring for the Presidio's urban forest.

title: Grow native plants at the Presidio nursery
blurb: Join the Presidio nursery on Wednesdays by invite or one Saturday a month.

title: Tend butterfly habitat at Strawberry Hill
blurb: Tend butterfly habitat at Strawberry Hill during a second-Saturday park shift.

title: Take a rescue dog on a walk
blurb: Give a rescue dog a walk after one intro walk with an experienced volunteer.

title: Foster a shelter animal at home
blurb: Open space at home for a shelter animal that needs foster care.

title: Tutor a job seeker in coding basics
blurb: Help a job seeker practice coding basics or job-readiness skills.

title: Give a nonprofit one hour of your expertise
blurb: Use one professional skill to help a nonprofit with a focused question.

title: Help a neighbor file their taxes for free
blurb: Help neighbors file taxes for free after completing IRS certification.

title: Help someone with a basic tech question
blurb: Sit with someone in the Tenderloin and help with a basic tech question.

title: Be a community ambassador in the Tenderloin
blurb: Walk the Tenderloin as a community ambassador, greeting neighbors and helping the block feel attended to.

title: Serve lunch with the house
org: Martin de Porres House of Hospitality
blurb: Walk in for a weekday or Saturday morning helping prepare and serve lunch.

title: Help with Saturday groceries at St. Gregory's
blurb: Spend Saturday morning helping a volunteer-run pantry share groceries with neighbors.

title: Drop in on Saturday farm hours
blurb: Show up Saturday morning to help a Bayview community farm with hands-on farm work.

title: Cook and share vegan meals on Wednesday
blurb: Email first, then join the Wednesday Mission crew to cook and share free vegan food.

title: Join a neighborhood cleanup
blurb: Pick a public cleanup from the Refuse Refuse SF calendar and spend a short shift outside.

title: Help at a garden volunteer day
blurb: Book a Wednesday or Saturday garden day and help care for an organic teaching garden.

title: Register for a community farm workday
blurb: Book a Monday or Saturday afternoon and help grow food at San Francisco's largest urban farm.

title: Sort children's books at the Book Bank
blurb: Book a 90-minute shift sorting donated children's books in Bayview.

title: Stand a Safe Passage corner shift
blurb: Email to join a two-hour Safe Passage corner shift in the Tenderloin.

title: Help with event or kit roles
blurb: Use PHC's volunteer portal for event-day, outreach, hygiene-kit, or admin roles.

title: Help build and sort hygiene kits at open house
blurb: RSVP for a July 8 drop-in open house assembling hygiene essentials and sorting supplies.

title: Volunteer at a summer concert
blurb: Join the 2026 summer volunteer program for concert-day shifts at Stern Grove.

title: Join a community center volunteer shift
blurb: Use City Hope SF's VolunteerHub calendar for dinner, cafe, breakfast, or beautification shifts.
